title: Desktop + SSH Notes
description: Some teams prefer a full desktop while fixing servers. Use an Ubuntu or Windows Desktop workstation (optional) to SSH into the target and drop an operator note file.

workstation.reason: Desktop workstations are ideal when you want a browser or GUI file manager alongside SSH. Terminal-only workstations work too.

tasks: Start the lab with a Desktop or Terminal workstation
Create /var/log/operator-note.txt with your session username on the first line

objectivesPublic.label: SSH into the lab
objectivesPublic.hint: Desktop labs still use SSH from the built-in terminal — session credentials are in the lab panel.

objectivesPublic.label: Create operator note
objectivesPublic.text: Create an operator note under /var/log that records who performed the change.
objectivesPublic.hint: A one-line file is enough — write your login name into a new file under /var/log (you may need elevated privileges).
